upasargachandrika.example_text: tE॰brA॰2.2.10.3 ityatra prapUrvasya lapermUQoktO prayogo'vyaktoktO vA
na tatra pralapetprAjYo baDirezviva gAyanaH atra praSabdo'rTAntarakfnna
'nABAnedizWo rapati pra venan' (f0 106118) prarapati pralapati stOti
'saMSrutya ca tapasviByaH satre vE yajYadakziRAm tAM cApalapatAm pApaH' (rA02.75.26) apalapatAm=apalapatu nihnutAm=uktaM nANgIkarotu

'apalApayamAnasya SatrUMstasyABavanmatiH' (Bawwi॰8.44) vaYcayamAnasya liyaH sammAnanaSAlInIkaraRayoSceti sUtre vfttO tatpUrvasya lAperAtmanepadaM darSitam nApapUrvasya BawwiprayogaH kimpramARaka iti suDIBirvicAryam
'jayanti mahatAM saMstutApalApinyaH kalyARinyo nItayaH' (mAlatI॰10) apalApo nihnavaH
'dEnyAd unmuKadarSanApalapanEH piRqArTamAyasyataH' (mudrA॰3.14) apalapanamihAdaro vA syAt priyoktiScAwUktirvA atrArTe pramARaM tu nopalaBAmahe na cArTAntaraM pratiBAti na cApi pAWAntaramasti
'saMlApo BAzaRaM miTaH' (amare) saMlApo nAwakezu samBAzaRaviSeze paWyate yo darpaRakAreRetTaM lakzyate— 'saMlApaH syAdgaBIroktirnAnABAvasamASrayeti
'vilalApa sa bAzpagadgadaM sahajAmapyapahAya DIratAm' (raGu0 843) vilalApa paryadevayata
'tAmiha vfTA kiM vilapAmi' (gIta0 3) sakrandanamaBivyAharAmi atrArTe'nyatra muDA mfgyaH prayogaH paridevanamAtre vilapiH prasiDyatyakarmakaH ayaM tu kaviriti niraNkuSaH
'evaM tezAM vilapatAM viprARAM viviDA giraH' (BA0 Adi0 18816) vilapatAM vyAharatAm vinA nArTaH tadarTasya viviDA ityanenEvoktatvAt

'vigataH pralApo'narTakaM vaco yasmAt satyaviSezaRam na cenmoGaM vipralaptaM mamedam' (BA0 SAM0 29145) vipralaptam=vipralapitam savistaraM prakarzeRa lapitaM BAzitamiha vipralapitamuktam carame caraRe paTyaM mumUrzoriva suprayuktam ityuktervirudDavacanamityarTo neha saNgacCate
'ahaM hyaraRye kaTamekamekA tvAmAlapeyaM niratA svaDarme' (BA0 vana0 2663) AlapeyaM saMBAzaye
'tatra yonyatkarmaRaH sADu manyenmoGaM tasyAlapitaM durbalasya' (BA0 u0 298) AlapitaM mantraRA saMmarSaH
'AlApASca pralApAScABIlAlapaSca ye' (aTarva0 11825) AlApA ABAzaRAni sArTakavacanAni aBIlAlapaH yaNluki kvipi bahuvacane rUpam aBItyatra sAMhitiko dIrGaH
'KalollApAH soQAH kaTamapi tadArADanaparEH' (Bartf0 36) ullApA upAlamBAH kAkvA varRanamullApaH (vEjayantI)
'na ca smArtamatadDarmABilApAd' (bra0 sU0 1219) aBilApo vyapadeSo nirdeSaH kaTanaM kIrtanam
'sa grAmaRIrastu sahAyamaDye strInfttagItErupalapyamAnaH' (avadA0 jA0 1918) upalapyamAno'BinandyamAnaH saBAjyamAnaH
